323.reason: [Potential infinite loop if block comment ends with file without "*/" and last character is not part of "*/", because curPos is not incremented when both conditions fail.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Potential infinite loop if block comment ends with file without "*/" and last character is not part of "*/", because curPos is not incremented when both conditions fail.]

267.reason: "\n" is a single character, so substr(curPos, 2) will never match it. It should be source.at(curPos) == '\n' to correctly track line numbers.
